title: Entergy (ETR) Requests Approval to Add 3GW Solar in Louisiana
text: Entergy (ETR) seeks approval to add 3GW of solar energy to its renewable generation portfolio. This initiative is in sync with its aim to achieve net-zero carbon emission by 2050.

title: 3 Large Cap Dividend Challengers for Millennial Investors
text: Income investors have a range of strategies at their disposal when it comes to dividends. High yield stocks.

title: Entergy (ETR) Seeks Permit for 225 MW of Solar Power Addition
text: Entergy's (ETR) arm, Entergy Louisiana, files a request with the Louisiana Public Service Commission to get approval for adding 225 MW of new solar power resources to its renewable portfolio.
